logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: "DEV", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId, //transmissionId: payload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", //payloadSizeBytes: sizeOf(write(payload, "application/json")), sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "SUCCESS", poNumber: payload.B2BMessage.Header.purchaseOrderNumber, partnerId: payload.B2BMessage.Header.receiverId }

ee:transform.doc:name: Preparing error payload for transaction api

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "FAILED", partnerId: payload.B2BMessage.Header.receiverId, poNumber: payload.B2BMessage.Header.purchaseOrderNumber default "UNKNOWN", error: error.description,
}

ee:transform.doc:name: Preparing error payload for transaction api
Add the Dataweave Template to be sent in email

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: "DEV", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId, //transmissionId: payload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", //payloadSizeBytes: sizeOf(write(payload, "application/json")), sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]
